title: Global Trades
description: Makes the curing process of villagers universal; once a villager is cured by a single player, the discounted trades are available to all players.
body:
# GLOBAL TRADES
Global Trades is a simple vanilla datapack which modifies the villager curing process so that once a villager is cured by a single player, the discounted trades are available to all players.
> In short: Allows all players to benefit from villager curing discounts

## Activation
> Simply download the file for your version of Minecraft Java Edition and place it in the datapacks folder and you should be good to go.
> To check the datapack is active use /datapack list


### Versions
> Should work for all newer versions of minecraft without further updates, if you have any problems check out _Important Information_ below.


### Important Information
-  Do not be concerned if the trades are not instantly universal as to optimise the pack it does not refresh instantly and requires a small interval of time to sync.

- Credit to MajOfMyth for helping me make this pack a reality.

- If you have any trouble with the pack feel free to leave a comment on this [Youtube Showcase](https://youtube.com/shorts/JmHg4bsGDKs?si=EJ9OrwA_EVUkVQtZ) and I'll reply as soon as I can.
